paper_title: Not a single-paper benchmark. Generic multiple-choice evaluation format used across many benchmarks.
evaluation_method: Generic multiple-choice question answering evaluation. For each question with N answer choices, the model either selects the answer with highest log-likelihood among the choices (log-likelihood mode) or generates an answer that is compared to the correct choice (generative mode). In lm-eval-harness, multiple_choice output_type computes the log-likelihood of each answer choice conditioned on the question and selects the highest. Evaluation is by exact match: the selected answer must match the gold label exactly.
metric: accuracy (exact match of selected answer to gold label)
